task_completion.description: Verify that a new class named 'SolarPanel' has been created as a subclass of 'CI', 'Equipment', or 'Asset'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint Administration module (Data Model -> Classes), 'SolarPanel' should be visible in the class tree hierarchy under 'CI', 'Equipment', or 'Asset'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the five required custom attributes were added to the 'SolarPanel' class with the correct data types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Attributes tab for the 'SolarPanel' class, look for: 'PanelCapacityKW' (Decimal), 'InstallationDate' (Date), 'Manufacturer' (String), 'InverterType' (String), and 'PanelCount' (Integer).

task_completion.description: Verify that three solar panel records have been created with the correct data from the specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenMaint Management module (under the SolarPanel class), there should be 3 records visible. Look for the manufacturers 'SunPower', 'Canadian Solar', and 'LONGi Green Energy' along with their respective capacities (150, 200, 75.5) and panel counts (42, 56, 22).

task_completion.description: Verify that each of the three solar panel records is linked to a Building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Building' reference column in the SolarPanel list view showing building names, or check individual record detail views/relation tabs showing a link to a Building entity.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to configure the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenMaint web interface in a browser, rather than just terminal commands or API scripts interacting with the database.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent opened or read the specification file to obtain the record data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window using 'cat' or a text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/solar_panel_spec.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: OpenMaint is a CMDBuild-based facility management system. The 'SolarPanel' class must have 5 attributes: PanelCapacityKW (Decimal), InstallationDate (Date), Manufacturer (String), InverterType (String), PanelCount (Integer). The 3 records to be created should have the following data: Record 1: SunPower, 150.0 kW, 42 panels, SMA Sunny Tripower 15000TL, 2025-01-15. Record 2: Canadian Solar, 200.0 kW, 56 panels, Fronius Symo 20.0-3-M, 2025-02-20. Record 3: LONGi Green Energy, 75.5 kW, 22 panels, Huawei SUN2000-8KTL-M1, 2025-03-10. They must be linked to the first three buildings in the system.
